📖 HOW TO PLAY

⛏️HOE soil → click tilled plot to plant seed
🌱Select a seed from the sidebar → click tilled soil
🪣WATER crops after planting — they won't grow without water!
⏱️Watered crops grow over time — check back later!
🔪Use SICKLE on glowing ✨ crops to harvest
🏡Harvest crops to unlock more fields!
